description_long: This is a charming residential house set within a lush, landscaped garden featuring mature trees, flowering shrubs, and a stone pathway leading to the main entrance. The house itself has a classic gable roof with red tiles, brick accents around the windows and corners, and a prominent glass greenhouse extension on one side. A small wooden shed with a matching tiled roof sits to the left, while a rustic bench and a bicycle add to the idyllic, lived-in atmosphere. The property includes a variety of outdoor elements such as potted plants, a wooden picnic table, and decorative garden features. The overall scene evokes a peaceful suburban or semi-rural home, blending natural and built environments harmoniously. The house appears to be a single-story structure with a well-defined entryway and multiple windows for ample natural light.
description: A picturesque single-story house with a red gable roof, brick accents, and a glass greenhouse, surrounded by trees, a shed, and garden features. The landscaped yard includes a stone path, bench, and outdoor decor, creating a cozy suburban setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, glass greenhouse, stone path, large trees, shed, and garden bench.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end of the house, shed, and more of the landscaped yard with trees and a bench.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the greenhouse extension, back wall of the house, and surrounding greenery.
description_view_3: Angled view from the back corner, showing the shed, picnic table, greenhouse, and dense garden foliage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of standard and greenhouse windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a small stoop, single door with glass panels, brick trim, and a stone path leading up to it
